nasb.text: for I know that this will turn out for my deliverance through your prayers and the provision of the Spirit of Jesus Christ,

esv.text: for I know that through your prayers and the help of the Spirit of Jesus Christ this will turn out for my deliverance,

cnv.text: 因為我知道，藉著你們的祈求和耶穌基督的靈的幫助，我一定會得到釋放。

ccb.text: 因为我知道，借着你们的祷告和耶稣基督之灵的帮助，我终会得到释放。

csbs.text: 因为我知道，藉着你们的祈祷和耶稣基督之灵的帮助，事情将为我转变以致我获救。
